history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, fluffy hair is captured from behind, looking down and to the side. He's wearing a light grey hoodie with bold, dark lettering on the back that reads "Made Noche" and features stylized blue snowflakes on either side of the "Made" text. The hoodie also has some text on the collar, partially visible and reversed, reading "SECOK HUSE".

The background is an outdoor setting at night, illuminated by numerous warm yellow string lights draped across a wooden pergola overhead. Lush green foliage and trees are visible behind the man, creating a natural, somewhat wild atmosphere. The ground is covered with small grey stones or gravel, interspersed with larger, flat stepping stones that form a path. A rustic wooden post with a metal handle is on the left side of the frame, adding to the outdoor ambiance. The overall lighting is dim and atmospheric, with the yellow lights creating a cozy and slightly magical glow against the dark surroundings. The mood is relaxed and contemplative, with a touch of urban streetwear style. The color palette is dominated by the grey of the hoodie, the dark lettering, the vibrant green of the plants, and the warm yellow of the lights.
